creator: sasaki12@gmail.com
text:
Getopt::Compact::WithCmd is yet another Getopt::* module. This module
is respected Getopt::Compact. This module is you can define of
git-like option. In addition, usage can be set at the same time.

WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Getopt-Compact-WithCmd/
